TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chris_Babb, title = Chris_Babb, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chris_Babb} }

S.FORM: == Chris Babb == Chris Babb hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 2, Chris Babb, squliq na p'unro. Chris Babb mrkyas ru htagan beh sa Kansas.suruw lga,hiya cingasal musa beh Arlington,Texas. hiya yaba ga mtzyaw syukan bbzilan maki lingay Dallas. Babb yaba ga Mike yaya ga Nikki.cyux qutux ssew mlikuy lalu nya ga Nick. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Chris Babb == Chris Babb hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 2, Chris Babb, squliq na p'unro. Chris Babb mrkyas ru htagan beh sa Kansas.suruw lga,hiya cingasal musa beh Arlington,Texas. hiya yaba ga mtzyaw syukan bbzilan maki lingay Dallas. Babb yaba ga Mike yaya ga Nikki.cyux qutux ssew mlikuy lalu nya ga Nick. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
